name: Client Operating Model Phase 5 Integration Automation Contracts
outcome_goal: Produce the integration action and automation contract capture implementation packet.
anti_requirements: Do not pretend unknown downstream automation is known.
Do not model integrations as mocks that cannot be falsified.

jobs.label: phase_05_integration_automation_contracts_packet
jobs.prompt: Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_05_integration_automation_contracts/PLAN.md. Produce a bounded build packet for Phase 5: Integration Action and Automation Contract Capture. Include action contracts, idempotency, side effects, webhook/event behavior, automation rule snapshots, rollback expectations, permissions, observability requirements, typed gaps, tests, and validation. Do not edit code.
